name: Plum Delicious Chinese Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken breasts, split with skin
6 Ripe purple plums, pitted and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken, skin side down, in an ungreased non-stick skillet or chicken fryer. Drain and discard the chicken fat.
2. Blot chicken with paper towel, remove the skin, and return it to the pan, skin side up.
3. Add remaining ingredients except the low calorie sweetener. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until chicken is tender (40-45 minutes).
4. Uncover and continue simmering until sauce is thick.
5. Add low calorie sweetener only after cooking is complete and skillet has been removed from heat.
